task_completion.description: Open the Sleep.csv dataset in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP application is open and the data view displays the 'Sleep' dataset, showing columns such as 'extra', 'group', and 'ID'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Linear Mixed Effects Model variables
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP analysis panel for 'Linear Mixed Models' is visible. 'extra' is placed in the Dependent Variable box, 'group' is in the Fixed Effects box, and 'ID' is configured as a Random Effect (Random Intercept).

task_completion.description: Generate and view the LMM results in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP results panel displays the output tables for the Linear Mixed Model, specifically showing the Model Fit table (containing AIC) and the Fixed Effects Estimates table.
A save dialog in JASP or the JASP window title bar indicates the file is being saved or has been saved as 'Sleep_LMM.jasp' in the /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ directory.
A text editor (like gedit or nano) is open, editing a file named 'lmm_report.txt' located in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/.

task_completion.description: Record the correct AIC, Fixed Effect, and conclusion in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the report containing an AIC value (around 78), a Fixed Effect estimate for 'group' (around 1.58), and a one-sentence conclusion.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the actual JASP application windows and menus, rather than running a Python/R script in the terminal to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The JASP file was saved directly from the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The JASP 'Save As' dialog is visible, or the JASP application window title updates to reflect the new filename, proving the file wasn't just touched/created via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent transcribed the results from the actual JASP output
integrity.visual_evidence: The AIC and Fixed Effect values typed into the text report match the values clearly visible in the JASP results panel from the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected fixed effect coefficient for 'group' is exactly 1.58 (acceptable tolerance is 0.1). The true AIC value for this model is approximately 78 (ignore any metadata claiming it should be 90-120, as that is flawed). The JASP file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Sleep_LMM.jasp and the text report as /home/ga/Documents/JASP/lmm_report.txt.
